field.label: SQL Injection Protection
field.help: Enable protection against SQL injection attacks targeting database queries

field.label: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Protection
field.help: Enable protection against reflected, stored, and DOM-based XSS attacks

field.label: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) Protection
field.help: Enable protection against CSRF attacks that trick users into performing unwanted actions

field.label: Remote File Inclusion (RFI) Protection
field.help: Enable protection against remote file inclusion attacks

field.label: Local File Inclusion (LFI) Protection
field.help: Enable protection against local file inclusion and directory traversal attacks

field.label: Directory Traversal Protection
field.help: Enable protection against path traversal attacks attempting to access files outside web root

field.label: Command Injection Protection
field.help: Enable protection against OS command injection attacks

field.label: HTTP Protocol Validation
field.help: Enable strict HTTP protocol validation to prevent malformed requests

field.label: File Upload Protection
field.help: Enable protection against malicious file uploads including virus scanning and type validation

field.label: Session Protection
field.help: Enable protection against session hijacking, fixation, and manipulation attacks

field.label: Custom WAF Rules
field.help: Enter custom WAF rules in ModSecurity format (one rule per line)
